{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The revised text maps against Long et al. (2023) and highlights the differences in handling latent confounders and scale. It articulates a clear delta compared to prior work.",
    "R1.7": "While the revised text mentions several works, it lacks specific details about missing or incorrect citations. The citation style is generally consistent with academic norms.",
    "RX.1": "The agent does not explicitly state uncertainty for any claims. It presents all statements as factual.",
    "RX.3": "The revised text mostly adheres to the requested scope by focusing on causal effect identification. However, there's a slight drift towards discussing the internal workings of the system.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the revised text. It avoids perpetuating existing biases or introducing new ones.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide traceability for the changes made to the original text. It's unclear which parts were rewritten and why."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The revised text maps against Long et al. (2023) and highlights the differences in handling latent confounders and scale. It articulates a clear delta compared to prior work.
rationale.R1.7: While the revised text mentions several works, it lacks specific details about missing or incorrect citations. The citation style is generally consistent with academic norms.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not explicitly state uncertainty for any claims. It presents all statements as factual.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text mostly adheres to the requested scope by focusing on causal effect identification. However, there's a slight drift towards discussing the internal workings of the system.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the revised text. It avoids perpetuating existing biases or introducing new ones.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide traceability for the changes made to the original text. It's unclear which parts were rewritten and why.
